name: Romanian translation
description: Romanian translation of Heroes of Might and Magic III: Complete Edition; please report issues here: https://github.com/vcmi-mods/romanian-translation/issues

1.0.6: Tweaks over the naming of town structures
1.0.3: Tweaks over the text and translation bugs fixed for some sentences
1.0.2: Initial translation of campaigns, chronicles, game, maps files in Romanian
